description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a hidden .tests-metadata-state job setting artifacts (knapsack/, rspec_flaky/, rspec_profiling/) to expire in 31 days and a variable TESTS_METADATA_S3_BUCKET=gitlab-ce-cache. Add a flaky-examples-check job (stage post-test) using the ruby:2.6-alpine image, allowed to fail, running only on merge_requests, and executing: '[[ -f $NEW_FLAKY_SPECS_REPORT ]] || echo "{}" > ${NEW_FLAKY_SPECS_REPORT}', 'scripts/merge-reports ${NEW_FLAKY_SPECS_REPORT} rspec_flaky/new_*_*.json', and 'scripts/detect-new-flaky-examples $NEW_FLAKY_SPECS_REPORT'. Add a retrieve-tests-metadata job (stage prepare) that pulls a cache key tests_metadata, creates knapsack/${CI_PROJECT_NAME}/, downloads knapsack, flaky, and profiling reports from the S3 bucket defined by TESTS_METADATA_S3_BUCKET (handling missing files), and optionally downloads EE reports when an ee/ directory exists. Add an update-tests-metadata job (stage post-test) that pushes the same cache key, runs only on master with specific server/namespace conditions, installs gems fog-aws mime-types activesupport rspec_profiling postgres-copy, creates empty knapsack report, merges knapsack and EE reports, syncs them to the S3 bucket if defined, cleans up node JSON files, merges flaky reports, generates and prunes flaky specs, syncs the flaky report to S3, removes temporary files, and finally runs scripts/insert-rspec-profiling-data. Ensure caches are defined (pull for retrieve, push for update) and artifacts are uploaded with the specified expirations.
